meaning: adj.分割为若干部分的,区划的
examples: The compartment syndrome was defined as intra-compartmental pressure of more than 30 mmHg.
The kinetics of zinc absorption of jejunum and that of ileum were compared in perfused rats by a two-compartmental model.
It is difficult to make a directness certification of compartmental oil driving water while oil invading water like piston forwarding.
